Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x217E "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Super Silverfish (TND - 2016).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0a00 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Super Silverfish (TND - 2016).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $0900 which:
1. Sets up the correct VICII settings to display the loading screen 2. Copies $80 bytes down from $C200 to $0200 (this block contains the data for the press space sprite on the loading screen) 3. Initialises the loading music by calling the routine at $1040
